title: SentinelFinding
description: A persistent SENTINEL check finding, cross-referenced to the C23 Shadow Registry. Authority: C27 §7. Related: Issue #768.

finding_id.description: UUID v4 for this finding. Immutable — findings never expire.

check_id.description: Which of the 7 C27 SENTINEL checks produced this finding.

detail.description: Structured machine-readable detail. Schema varies by check_id.

detected_at.description: UTC ISO 8601 timestamp when the finding was detected.

sentinel_case_id.description: C23 Shadow Registry case ID. Set when the finding is linked to an open case.

resolved_at.description: UTC ISO 8601 timestamp when the finding was resolved. null if unresolved.

resolution_notes.description: Human-readable notes on how the finding was resolved.

audit_entry_id.description: AuditLogEntry.entry_id that recorded this finding being raised.

SentinelCheckId.description: 7 SENTINEL check IDs per C27 §7. CHK-001: valid state transition | CHK-002: steward bond presence | CHK-003: audit log integrity | CHK-004: adoption queue timeout | CHK-005: steward obligation | CHK-006: cross-GAIAN authorization | CHK-007: rights preservation.

SentinelSeverity.description: 4 severity levels per C27 §7. INFO=log only | WARNING=steward notify 7-day | VIOLATION=48hr mandatory response | CRITICAL=24hr GAIA Root escalation.

response_deadline.description: Mandatory response deadline. 48h for VIOLATION, 24h for CRITICAL.

notified_principals.description: List of principals (steward IDs, GAIA Root) who have been notified.

gaia_root_case_id.description: GAIA Root escalation case ID. Only set for CRITICAL findings.

examples.description: ACTIVE GAIAN has no valid steward bond. Bond status: ABANDONED.
